title: encelia cordata
intro: Encelia cordata, also known as the Heart-Leaf Encilia or Heart Leaf Bush, is a shrub-like plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and terpenoids. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and even exhibiting antioxidant properties. Encelia cordata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is sometimes used in herbal remedies to promote wound healing and soothe skin irritations.
